note: FTR-22 definition-boost regression baseline. Offline tier (BM25 + structural, no dense) over the real self-indexed src/ corpus. recall@10 WITH the distance-0 pin must stay 1.0 — every 'how does <symbol> work' body chunk is guaranteed in top-k.
